tool_args.label: MTA Regular Board Meeting July 21, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Regular Board Meeting 2 Broadway New York, NY 10004 Wednesday, July 21, 2021 10:00 a.m.

payload.description: MTA Regular Board Meeting held at 2 Broadway, New York, NY. Chairman Patrick Foye's last Board meeting as Chairman and CEO. Included CFO presentation of 2021 Mid-Year Forecast, 2022 Preliminary Budget, and July Financial Plan 2022-2024.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Minutes Regular Board Meeting 2 Broadway New York, NY 10004 Wednesday, July 21, 2021 10:00 a.m.
Chairman Foye announced that, as everyone is aware, this is his last MTA Board meeting as Chairman and CEO.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: MTA received $14.5 billion in federal aid
tool_args.raw_text: Chairman Foye noted that the MTA received an unprecedented allocation of federal aid—$14.5 billion

payload.claim_text: The MTA received an unprecedented allocation of federal aid—$14.5 billion from three separate rounds of federal COVID funding
payload.subject: MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: Chairman Foye noted that the MTA received an unprecedented allocation of federal aid—$14.5 billion

tool_args.label: MTA deficits and need for recurring revenue
tool_args.raw_text: Chairman Foye stated that before the pandemic the MTA faced significant structural deficits and balanced its budget using one-shots each year, but that is not a sustainable long-term strategy—the agency needs new and recurring revenue sources.

payload.claim_text: Before the pandemic the MTA faced significant structural deficits and balanced its budget using one-shots each year, but that is not a sustainable long-term strategy—the agency needs new and recurring revenue sources.
payload.subject: MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: Chairman Foye stated that before the pandemic the MTA faced significant structural deficits and balanced its budget using one-shots each year, but that is not a sustainable long-term strategy—the agency needs new and recurring revenue sources.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: MTA C&D creation and consolidation
tool_args.raw_text: C&D was created as an organization in January 2020, following the Board's adoption of the Alix report and the legislature's mandate to integrate a range of MTA functions, including capital planning and construction as part of the MTA's Transformation process which has been completed at C&D. So overnight we went from 13 people doing mega projects to 1700 people doing all capital projects.

payload.claim_text: C&D was created as an organization in January 2020, following the Board's adoption of the Alix report and the legislature's mandate to integrate a range of MTA functions, including capital planning and construction. Overnight we went from 13 people doing mega projects to 1700 people doing all capital projects.
payload.subject: MTA Construction & Development

evidence_refs.source_quote: C&D was created as an organization in January 2020, following the Board's adoption of the Alix report and the legislature's mandate to integrate a range of MTA functions, including capital planning and construction as part of the MTA's Transformation process which has been completed at C&D. So overnight we went from 13 people doing mega projects to 1700 people doing all capital projects.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: 11 ADA stations completed in 2020
tool_args.raw_text: 11 ADA Stations were completed and Board Member we did 11 ADA stations and Board Member Victor Calise along with the MTA's Chief Accessibility Officer Quemuel Arroyo joined us for the equivalent of 'ribbon cutting' at these stations to celebrate their accessibility.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 11 ADA Stations were completed

tool_args.label: Elmont and Belmont stations as Zone 4
tool_args.raw_text: Elmont & Belmont. Eastbound special events service to LIRR's new Elmont Station is scheduled to be launched in October 2021. With its opening, the Elmont Station, which is within Nassau County, needs to be incorporated into the LIRR's existing passenger tariff and fare zone structure as a Zone 4 station. The Belmont Park Station ... needs to be incorporated into LIRR's existing passenger tariff and fare zone structure as a Zone 4 station.

payload.claim_text: Elmont Station and Belmont Park Station were incorporated into LIRR fare zone structure as Zone 4 stations. Elmont Station eastbound special events service scheduled to launch October 2021.
payload.subject: LIRR

evidence_refs.source_quote: Eastbound special events service to LIRR's new Elmont Station is scheduled to be launched in October 2021
The existing Belmont Park Station ... needs to be incorporated into LIRR's existing passenger tariff and fare zone structure as a Zone 4 station

tool_args.label: 83% of 2015-2019 Capital Program awarded
tool_args.raw_text: CDO Lieber reported that we are five years into the 2015-19 Capital Program because as many of you will remember, the 2015-19 Capital Program didn't get funded until eighteen months into that official period. The good news is in that five-year period, we've awarded 83% of the dollars that were part of the 2015-19 program
